requiredContext.sql: SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail, o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus, o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount >= #{minAmount} AND o.user_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders) ) LIMIT 10
requiredContext.templateSql:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus,
               o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt
        FROM users u
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        WHERE o.amount >= #{minAmount}
        AND o.user_id IN (
            SELECT user_id FROM orders 
            WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders)
        )
        LIMIT 10
